title: Two-point spectral energy equals twice physical energy

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: For the real two-point DFT, the squared DC mode plus squared Nyquist mode equals twice the squared physical energy.
assumptions: u0 and u1 are real numbers
spectral energy is DC squared plus Nyquist squared
physical energy is u0 squared plus u1 squared
informal.expected_conclusion: The spectral energy equals twice the physical energy.

declarations.name: dft2DC
declarations.statement: def dft2DC (u0 u1 : Real) : Real := u0 + u1

declarations.name: dft2Nyquist
declarations.statement: def dft2Nyquist (u0 u1 : Real) : Real := u0 - u1

declarations.name: dft2Energy
declarations.statement: def dft2Energy (u0 u1 : Real) : Real := dft2DC u0 u1 ^ 2 + dft2Nyquist u0 u1 ^ 2

declarations.name: physical2Energy
declarations.statement: def physical2Energy (u0 u1 : Real) : Real := u0 ^ 2 + u1 ^ 2

declarations.name: dft2Energy_eq_two_physical2Energy
declarations.statement: theorem dft2Energy_eq_two_physical2Energy (u0 u1 : Real) : dft2Energy u0 u1 = 2 * physical2Energy u0 u1

tasks.input: Translate the two-point DFT energy identity into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem dft2Energy_eq_two_physical2Energy (u0 u1 : Real) : dft2Energy u0 u1 = 2 * physical2Energy u0 u1

tasks.input: Complete the Lean proof by unfolding the energy and mode definitions and expanding.
tasks.target: Unfold dft2Energy, physical2Energy, dft2DC, and dft2Nyquist, then use ring.

tasks.input: Find the definitions needed to expand the two-point DFT energy identity.
